## Product Restoration Checklist

- [ ] Product work lives in this standalone product repo, not under `figma-to-code-skills`
- [ ] Product Restoration Preflight docs are complete before UI code
- [ ] Every implemented state maps to a Figma node or approved provisional source
- [ ] Design-owned assets are exported before implementation code depends on them
- [ ] Build command passed
- [ ] Production preview/package asset paths verified
- [ ] Browser/DOM evidence recorded in docs or PR notes
- [ ] Temporary demo/test/verification UI removed from the production-facing product
- [ ] Automated tests, build scripts, verification docs, and reusable fixtures preserved unless explicitly obsolete
